headline: VICI Properties: The Caesars Uncertainty Created A Tremendous Value Proposition
summary: VICI Properties offers exposure to trophy Las Vegas Strip real estate via long-term, triple-net leases with built-in rent escalators. Read why VICI stock is a strong buy.
